## 定时器
[详细介绍](https://www.cnblogs.com/guoew/p/11453231.html)

## emmc
```shell
var="$(cat /sys/kernel/debug/mmc0/mmc0\:0001/ext_csd)"
eol=${var:534:2};slc=${var:536:2};mlc=${var:538:2}
echo "EOL:0x$eol SLC:0x$slc MLC:0x$mlc"
```
